caption: The video appears to be a news segment covering a political event involving the Chief Minister of Bihar, Nitish Kumar. The footage shows Nitish Kumar speaking into a microphone, likely addressing an audience or the media. He is surrounded by other individuals, possibly government officials or members of his team. The text on the screen indicates that the Prime Minister has congratulated both Deputy Chief Ministers of Bihar. The visuals and text suggest a formal setting, possibly a press conference or a public announcement. The news ticker at the bottom provides additional context, mentioning the upcoming 2024 elections and the potential alliance with JDU (Janata Dal United). The overall tone of the video seems to be informative, focusing on political developments and leadership in Bihar.
